title: Express Dashboard
excerpt: Learn about the features of the Express Dashboard. The Express Dashboard is a user interface that’s available to your platform’s connected accounts. They can use the Express Dashboard to monitor their available balance, view upcoming *payouts* (A payout is the transfer of funds to an external account, usually a bank account, in the form of a deposit), view payments, manage disputes, issue refunds, and track their earnings in real time. This guide outlines the features of the Express Dashboard and how your connected accounts can access it. The Express Dashboard displays the connected account’s balance transactions and net volume.…
